prompt: Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?

inputData.question: Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?"},"startedAt":1771803993219,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Average reported workload_hours are computed per course by joining course_evaluations -> enrollments -> course_sections -> courses, excluding NULL workload values, rounding averages to 2 decimals, and returning the top 10 by average workload (deterministically tie-broken by course code and name).","sql":"WITH avg_w AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS average_workload_hours,
    COUNT(ce.workload_hours) AS evaluations_count
  FROM public.course_evaluations ce
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  average_workload_hours,
  evaluations_count
FROM avg_w
ORDER BY average_workload_hours DESC, course_code ASC, course_name ASC
LIMIT 10;","assumptions":["workload_hours in course_evaluations represents the reported workload to average (numeric), nulls should be excluded","include courses with at least one non-null workload report","tie-breaking is deterministic using course_code then course_name"]},"endedAt":1771804035482},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH avg_w AS (

  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  average_workload_hours,
  evaluations_count
FROM avg_w
ORDER BY average_workload_hours DESC, course_code ASC, course_name ASC

visualization.title: Top 10 courses by average reported workload (hours)

resultRaw.sql:
WITH avg_w AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS average_workload_hours,
    COUNT(ce.workload_hours) AS evaluations_count
  FROM public.course_evaluations ce
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  average_workload_hours,
  evaluations_count
FROM avg_w
ORDER BY average_workload_hours DESC, course_code ASC, course_name ASC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.title: Top 10 courses by average reported workload (hours)

result.sql:
WITH avg_w AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS average_workload_hours,
    COUNT(ce.workload_hours) AS evaluations_count
  FROM public.course_evaluations ce
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  average_workload_hours,
  evaluations_count
FROM avg_w
ORDER BY average_workload_hours DESC, course_code ASC, course_name ASC
LIMIT 10;
